user_claim: Customer: Hi, I found new damage on my car after it was parked outside overnight. | Support: Sorry to hear that. Can you describe what changed? | Customer: The back of the car has a dent now. It was not there before. | Support: Did anything else break or is it mostly body damage? | Customer: Mostly the rear bumper area. I attached the photo I took this morning.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The image clearly shows a large dent and damage to the rear bumper area of the car.
claim_status_justification: The rear bumper and trunk area of the car have visible dents and deformation consistent with the user's claim. User history adds review context.

user_claim: Customer: Parking lot mein meri car ko scrape lag gaya. | Support: Aap kis type ka damage report karna chahte hain? | Customer: Front side par mark aa gaya hai, bumper ke upar. | Support: Light damage hai ya body par scratch? | Customer: Light theek hai, front bumper par scratch hai. Photos upload kar diye hain.
evidence_standard_met_reason: Image img_1 clearly shows damage on the front bumper with scratches and dents, supporting the claim of light damage on the front bumper.
claim_status_justification: The first image shows visible scratches and dents on the front bumper, consistent with the user's claim of scrape damage on the front bumper. User history adds review context.

user_claim: Customer: I am opening a claim for my windshield. | Support: What happened? | Customer: A small stone hit it while I was driving and now there is a crack spreading from that spot. | Support: Is the car otherwise okay? | Customer: Yes, this is only about the front glass. I added the pictures I have.
evidence_standard_met_reason: Image img_1 clearly shows a cracked windshield consistent with the claim.
claim_status_justification: The first image shows a windshield with a visible crack spreading from a point, matching the claim of damage from a small stone.

user_claim: Customer: Someone clipped my car while it was parked. | Support: What part was hit? | Customer: The side mirror got damaged. It is not sitting the way it should anymore. | Support: Was there any damage to the door too? | Customer: I did not notice anything else major, just the mirror.
evidence_standard_met_reason: Image clearly shows the side mirror is cracked and damaged.
claim_status_justification: The side mirror is visibly cracked and damaged, consistent with the claim of being clipped and not sitting properly.

user_claim: Customer: I want to file this as bumper damage. | Support: Can you tell me what happened? | Customer: The car was tapped from behind and now the back looks damaged. | Support: Are you asking for review of the rear side? | Customer: Yes, the back bumper. evidence_standard_met_reason: The images clearly show the damage and the claimed part.
claim_status_justification: Image img_2 shows the rear bumper with no visible damage, while img_1 shows a dent on the side body panel, not the rear bumper as claimed. User history adds review context.

user_claim: Customer: Hi, I am not fully sure how to explain this because I noticed it only after reaching home. | Support: No problem, please tell me what happened. | Customer: There was a small bump earlier, nothing major, and I first thought everything was fine. Later I looked at the car again because my family member said the front area looked different. | Support: Are you reporting a general vehicle issue or a specific damaged part? | Customer: I was confused at first because I checked the side and the front and walked around the car a few times. I do not want to claim the wrong thing. | Support: That is okay. What part do you want reviewed? | Customer: After checking again, I think the issue is with the headlight. It looks like the headlight may be cracked, so please review that part.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The image shows the side of a car but does not clearly show the headlight or any damage to it.
claim_status_justification: The headlight is not visible in the image, so no damage can be confirmed or denied.

user_claim: Customer: There is a dent along the side of my car. | Support: When did you notice it? | Customer: This morning, after the car had been parked near the gate. | Support: Is it near the front or back? | Customer: It is on the door panel area. evidence_standard_met_reason: The second image clearly shows a dent on the door panel of the car.
claim_status_justification: Image img_2 shows a visible dent on the door panel, matching the user's claim. User history adds review context.

user_claim: Customer: I picked up my car after service and noticed a mark on the hood. | Support: What kind of mark is it? | Customer: It looks like a scratch across the top panel. | Support: Do you think it happened during service? | Customer: Yes, that is why I am asking for review. claim_status_justification: The image shows the car hood is severely damaged and partially missing, consistent with a major mark or damage claim. User history adds review context.

user_claim: Customer: My laptop fell from the table yesterday. | Support: Is it turning on? | Customer: It turns on, but the display glass has a crack now. | Support: Are you reporting the screen only or the whole laptop? | Customer: The screen is the issue. I attached a photo of it open.

claim_status_justification: The image (img_1) shows a laptop with a cracked screen glass consistent with the user's claim. User history adds review context.

user_claim: Customer: The laptop no longer opens smoothly. | Support: What seems to be wrong mechanically? | Customer: The hinge area has broken and the screen wobbles. | Support: Did this happen after a drop? | Customer: Yes, it slipped from the sofa. I uploaded photos from the outside and side.

user_claim: Customer: My laptop bag fell from a chair and hit the floor. | Support: What damage did you notice? | Customer: One corner of the laptop has a dent now. | Support: Does the laptop still work? | Customer: It works, but the outer corner is damaged. I added two photos.

user_claim: Customer: I am not sure if this should be a repair claim or a replacement claim, so I wanted to ask first. | Support: We can help. What device is this about? | Customer: It is my laptop. At first I thought the laptop was okay because it still opened. | Support: What changed after that? | Customer: Later, while using it, I noticed marks on the display area. I restarted it twice because I thought it might just be something on the screen, but it still bothered me. | Support: Are you reporting keyboard, hinge, body, or screen damage? | Customer: Not the keyboard or hinge. evidence_standard_met_reason: Image clearly shows a shattered screen with visible cracks radiating from a central point.
claim_status_justification: Visible damage is on screen, not the claimed keyboard.
